TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Gipun hya ga cyux maki tay 36 00 N, 138 00 E na Aziya syuw. kwara kinghciyan niya 377,915 sq km (maki tay 62ginkgan kin wahci) (kinwhci niya ga 364,485 sq km , kinwhci na lawsayan wsilung hya ga 13,430 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara squliq hya ga 126,702,133. Pinbcyan naha sni naha rhzyal hya iy pqmahun hya ga 12.50% , lhlahuy hya ga 68.50%, sni naha sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya ga 19%. spzyang qalang na kokka spzyang naha krahu qalang hya ga Tokyo. snyan kinramat inlungan na kokka snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 23 na tay mawpuw sazing byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw kokka mrhuw kokka ta misuw hya ga Akihito, aring ryax 7 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 1989 lga, musa spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita sa brbiru CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: …£ipun ńßja …£a ¶~ ®jux maki taj ** ** n, *** ** e na azija s~…ējuw. kwara kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija ***,*** s~…ēq km (maki taj **…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i nija …£a ***,*** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja …£a **,*** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara s~…ēquliq ńßja …£a ***,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa s~…ēni nańßa rńßzjal ńßja ij pqmańßun ńßja …£a **.**% , lńßlańßuj ńßja …£a **.**%, s~…ēni nańßa s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja …£a **%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa krańßu qalaŇč ńßja …£a tokjo. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a ** na taj mawpuw s~…ēaziŇč ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka mrńßuw kokka ta mis~…ēuw ńßja …£a akińßito, ariŇč rjax * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru ¶~ ®ia ***
S.FORM: Gipun hya ga cyux maki tay 36 00 N, 138 00 E na Aziya syuw. kwara kinghciyan niya 377,915 sq km (maki tay 62ginkgan kin wahci) (kinwhci niya ga 364,485 sq km , kinwhci na lawsayan wsilung hya ga 13,430 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara squliq hya ga 126,702,133. Pinbcyan naha sni naha rhzyal hya iy pqmahun hya ga 12.50% , lhlahuy hya ga 68.50%, sni naha sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya ga 19%. spzyang qalang na kokka spzyang naha krahu qalang hya ga Tokyo. snyan kinramat inlungan na kokka snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 23 na tay mawpuw sazing byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw kokka mrhuw kokka ta misuw hya ga Akihito, aring ryax 7 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 1989 lga, musa spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita sa brbiru CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: …£ipun ńßja …£a ¶~ ®jux maki taj ** ** n, *** ** e na azija s~…ējuw. kwara kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija ***,*** s~…ēq km (maki taj **…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i nija …£a ***,*** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja …£a **,*** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara s~…ēquliq ńßja …£a ***,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa s~…ēni nańßa rńßzjal ńßja ij pqmańßun ńßja …£a **.**% , lńßlańßuj ńßja …£a **.**%, s~…ēni nańßa s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja …£a **%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa krańßu qalaŇč ńßja …£a tokjo. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a ** na taj mawpuw s~…ēaziŇč ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka mrńßuw kokka ta mis~…ēuw ńßja …£a akińßito, ariŇč rjax * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru ¶~ ®ia ***
